content.en:
Black Sacred Mountain.

This is a very famous treasure land in the Void Region, but it is not easy for ordinary Legendary Realm Lords to reach the Black Saint Mountain, it is a mysterious mountain that is difficult to reach, just like an eternal treasure, you can see but you can't enter it.

Only the Peak Legendary Realm Lord could easily reach the Black Saint Mountain.

Of course, if there is a peak Legendary Realm Lord who enters, the Legendary Realm Lord can also enter it, and the Legendary Lord can also do it.

As a result, some of the descendants of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord will be taken into the Black Sacred Mountain by the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

The origin of the Black Sacred Mountain is very mysterious, some say that it is a treasure mountain made by the Eternal Master, but others say that it is a treasure land born naturally in the Void Region.

One thing is certain, and that is that every Eternal Master has been to the Black Sacred Mountain.

The Black Sacred Mountain is not very helpful to the Legendary Lord "One Seven Zero@ and the Legendary Realm Lord, but it is not a small help to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

The Black Sacred Mountain has a special magic circle, which can sacrifice time treasures and space treasures, thus presenting a scene of time and space fusion, allowing the peak Legendary Realm Lord to comprehend.

The more treasures you sacrifice, the longer you will be enlightened.

In the void area, there are many peak legendary realm lords who have comprehended the mystery of space-time fusion through the Black Holy Mountain, and finally stepped into the second level of peak legendary realm lords.

Of course, after a peak Legendary Realm Lord came a few times, I was afraid that he didn't want to come, not only because of the price to pay, but also because the time and space were fused to the later stage, and the difficulty was getting bigger and bigger, and the help of the Black Saint Mountain was not great.

At that time, the price paid is not proportional to the gain, and naturally it will not come.

Of course, although some peak Legendary Realm lords would not use the magic circle of the Black Sacred Mountain to comprehend the fusion of time and space, they would send their juniors in to comprehend.

"Let's go and give it a try first, if the effect is good, let Yue'er, Xingchen, Xingyue and them also come here to cultivate for a while. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the Black Saint Mountain.

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

There are ancient cities here, also known as the Thirteen Cities of the Black Saint, and the lord of each city is a Legendary Realm Lord.

The reason why the Thirteen Cities of the Black Saint was born here is because there are often peak legend realm lords who come here, so many geniuses are eager to be appreciated by the peak legend realm lords, and Wan Qian has been accepted as a disciple, isn't it directly rising?

As a result, many legendary lords and even legendary realm lords of Xu Zhu Duoduo came here, gradually forming a prosperous cultivation area.

Occasionally, there are really peak legendary realm lords who stay in the Thirteen Cities of the Black Saint and point out to the juniors.

When Ye Tian came here, he did not stay in the Thirteen Cities of the Black Saint, but directly entered the Black Spear Mountain.

Layers of time and space were peeled away, and Ye Tian easily entered the interior of the Black Saint Mountain.

"Endless Lord, you're here!"

A figure appeared on the Black Saint Mountain and walked in front of Ye Tian.

She's the Lord of the Word.

Not long ago, a clone of the Lord of the Word of Darkness also came here to cultivate, and Ye Tian knew about the Black Holy Mountain, and he also learned about it from the Lord of the Word of the Word.

"Lord of the Word, how is the Black Sacred Mountain?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Dark Word nodded, "It's okay, but it's the first time to comprehend the best." Of course, I suggest that you should not have more than 100 eternal years at a time, and then come out after 100 eternal years. After thoroughly digesting the perception, then enter the enlightenment, which is the best effect. Moreover, in addition to sacrificial sacrifices, there are several good places in Heisheng Mountain, which are also worth visiting. "

"Lord of the Word, if you have time, introduce me. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Dark Word took Ye Tian to a long black river in Black Saint 1L.

This black river is a little weird, not a long river of time, but even more weird than the long river of time, and the power it contains is very strange, as if it is not any kind of power in cognition.

"You can fish here!"

The Lord of the Word said.

"Fishing?" Ye Tian was surprised.

The Lord of the Dark Word pointed to the distance and said, "The Border Lord, once rescued the Lord of the Trick Star, and the lack of clone of the Border Lord has been fishing here all year round. However, the peak Legendary Realm lord cannot enter the river, otherwise his consciousness will be annihilated, but from this river, some special fish creatures can be fished, these fish creatures are poisonous to the strong people under the legendary realm, but for us at the peak of the legendary realm, they are delicious 0........ We are not interested in food anymore, and we don't have any special feeling about what we eat, but the fish here are different. What's more, the fish here can temper our will, improve our will a little bit. "

"Will-boosting fish, and it's delicious, it's really valuable!"

Ye Tianke knew very well how difficult it was to improve his will, and the same was true for other peak Legendary Realm lords, if he wanted to continue to improve his will, the time and treasures needed were unimaginable.

"Endless Lord, when you are idle and bored, you can come here to fish, and fishing is not ordinarily difficult, in the void area, the strongest fishing skills are the border lords, and we, the ordinary peak Legends Realm lords, it is extremely difficult to catch a fish, it takes a long time and enough patience to do it. "

"Let's go, I'll take you somewhere else.

The Lord of the Dark Word took Ye Tian to another place.

It's a mountain crevice.

The Lord of the Dark Word pointed to this mountain crack and said, "Endless Lord, this mountain crack is not an ordinary mountain crevice, it is connected to the misty corridor, even if the peak Legendary Realm Lord enters it, he will be trapped and almost unable to come out. However, the misty corridor has a kind of vision, and entering it can also have the effect of tempering, if you are lucky, you may witness a certain chance vision, and the integration of time and space has greatly improved. Therefore, many peak Legendary Realm lords will send a clone into it at 0.9, and one of my clones is also in it. However, there is not much to be gained so far. "

"Misty Corridor!

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to let the copy body in.

Then, the Lord of the Dark Word took Ye Tian to the sacrificial array, where he could directly comprehend the fusion of time and space.

And this location is located on the top of the Black Sacred Mountain, and there is a huge magic circle on it, and any peak Legendary Realm Lord can enter the magic circle and sacrifice time and space treasures

And after every peak Legendary Realm lord entered, they couldn't meet each other, and they couldn't sense each other's existence

Therefore, such a magic circle cannot be arranged by the peak Legendary Realm Lord, so it will be considered to be arranged by the Eternal Master. _
